notes: Cataloged from lyrics provided. Structure: Chorus → Verse 1 → Chorus → Verse 2 (grief from friend's perspective) → Chorus → Outro. Two distinct voices: Verse 1 is self-destructive speaker (OD fantasy, funeral imagery, purgatory). Verse 2 shifts to surviving friend — heartbroken, angry at the deceased, funeral preparation, waking up to call their voicemail. GAWNE appears again (2nd song cataloged). Key line: 'Today's the day, and no pun intended / My best friend is asleep at a wake.' Outro reprises the 'roll the dice' gambling metaphor — ties back to wheel mechanic thematically.
